records.title: Zlatan Ibrahimović sends support to Harry Souttar, Lucas Herrington after penalty misses
records.description: The Socceroos and Zlatan Ibrahimović have rallied around Harry Souttar and Lucas Herrington, after their missed penalties in Australia's World Cup shoutout loss to Egypt

records.title: Socceroos go down in penalty shootout vs. Egypt
records.description: Misses from Australia's Harry Souttar and 18-year-old Lucas Herrington prove costly as Egypt slot 4-of-4 from the spot to advance to the Round of 16.
